summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of AriesHitX v3.5 dashboard. All major features working correctly with proper dark theme implementation.
passed_tests: Dark theme verification (correct colors: #0a0a0a body, #111 panels, #1a1a1a inputs)
Bin Entry input accepts values correctly
Advanced section expansion shows proxy input
Proxy input accepts multiple proxy entries
Gateway modal opens with toggleable gateways
Bin Library modal with Use buttons auto-filling bin input
Settings modal with all required sections (Premium, Interface, Proxy, Autofill, Telegram)
Telegram buttons with correct links (t.me/ariesxhit, t.me/AriesCharity)
Fingerprint generator creates and logs fingerprints
Logs panel copy and clear functionality
No neon colors present - proper muted purple accent (#8b5cf6)
All UI components properly positioned and visible
